pipeline_note: 142 → 47 → 27: 142 = raw hits across epochs × window sizes (no greedy mask); 47 = union-merge of overlapping windows (full historical); 27 = greedy global_series on modern Δt=2 yr.
fdr_applicability: BH on 142 correlated sliding-window tests is exploratory only — windows overlap strongly; M_eff << 142. Primary FDR in paper applies post-hoc to 47 merged-series p-values (not window-level discovery).
